title: achras mayana
intro: Achras mayana, also known as the Sapodilla tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Americas, belonging to the Sapotaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in various herbal medicine systems for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Achras mayana include the potential treatment of digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, as well as the ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Achras mayana include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be made from the tree's bark, leaves, and roots.
